items.caption: An empty shelf in a supermarket, with a single roll of toilet paper placed on the top shelf. the shelf is labeled with a price tag, indicating it is for sale. the background is a typical supermarket aisle with other shelves visible, but they are also empty. the floor is tiled, and there is a watermark on the image that reads "b'a view of empty shelves as toilet roll is almost sold out in a supermarket in ashford'."
